contract_claim: L105: parameter `finding_from_junk.root` — All 6 call sites invoke `finding_from_junk` with only a `JunkFinding` positional argument (via `_junk(...)`) and never pass `root` as a keyword or positional argument. The parameter always takes its default value of `None`. The `root` value is forwarded to `_norm_path`, where the branch `if root is not None and p.is_absolute()` (inside `_norm_path`) handles it, but that gating is in the helper — no conditional branch gated exclusively by `root` exists inside `finding_from_junk` itself.
observed_behavior: Remove the `root` keyword parameter from `finding_from_junk` and replace the call `_norm_path(jf.source_path, root)` with `_norm_path(jf.source_path)` (passing `None` implicitly via `_norm_path`'s own default). If `root`-based path relativization is ever needed in the future it can be re-added then.
